content: TP-187 remains genuinely blocked at Step 2. I preserved the completed Step 1 spec work, did not fabricate any dashboard UI code, and updated STATUS.md with the exact missing prompt-scoped files (`dashboard/public/index.html`, `dashboard/public/app.js`, `dashboard/public/style.css`, `dashboard/server.cjs`), the verification commands used (`find . -path '*/dashboard/*'`, `git ls-files | grep dashboard`, repo-root `ls`), and the blocked boundary: no further safe doc-only work remains without restored dashboard assets or a prompt amendment.
